allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in t.get\('tree',[]\) if 'data-raw/csv' in x['path']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in t['tree'] if x['path'].startswith\('data-raw/csv'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; names=[f['name'] for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]; [print\(n\) for n in names if 'gdp' in n.lower\(\) or 'nasa' in n.lower\(\)]")
